---
title: "Self-Check Variants"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp04"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short introduction for this quick self-check._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.self-check data-variant="quick"}
**Quick Self-Check**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-4 questions for the learner to consider._]

- Question 1
- Question 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a model answer or reflection points._]
:::
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short introduction for this deep self-check._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.self-check data-variant="deep"}
**Quick Self-Check**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-4 questions for the learner to consider._]

- Question 1
- Question 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a model answer or reflection points._]
:::
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Reflection Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Reveal Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
